summary: Audited the BOQ and execution-side secondary flow family and found a real runtime residual. The representative entrypoints are group-visible and their target models look accessible, but action_open_project_progress_entry() and action_exec_structure_entry.run() still fail for delivered roles with ir.actions.act_window.view ACL errors.

notes: This family is not blocked by missing samples; representative no-write runtime entrypoints already fail.
The failure pattern matches earlier act_window.view ACL residuals on follow-through action paths.
Further progress now requires a dedicated narrow implementation batch for execution-side action dispatch.

next_step: Stop the chain and open a narrow implementation batch to remove ir.actions.act_window.view ACL dependence from progress-entry and execution-structure follow-through entrypoints.
